S.FORM: Art Bakeraitis sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1925, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 2, Art Bakeraitis, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: art ОІakeraitis~Й• s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, art ОІakeraitis~Й•, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
